DonateTab.label: Donate
DonateTab.ariaLabel: Donate to the Kids and Teens Foundation
DonateTab.tooltipBody: 100% of your donation goes directly to student wellness programs. Zero overhead.

Home.subheading: Board-certified pediatricians across Greater LA, with same-day visits, telehealth, and a doctor your family can stick with from newborn to age 21.
Home.whyChooseUsHeading: Care built around your family's schedule.
Home.whyChooseUsBody: {count} clinics across Greater LA means expert pediatric care is always close by, with same-day visits and telehealth for the days you can't make it in.
Home.telehealthBody: Connect with a board-certified pediatrician through a secure video visit, with the same care and attention as an in-person appointment.
Home.telehealthImageAlt: A patient on a video telehealth visit with a pediatrician
Home.networkHeading: More ways to care for your family.
Home.clinicNearYouBody: {count} locations across Greater LA with addresses, phone lines, and a live map.
Home.careersBody: Join a pediatric network built around same-day care.
Home.resourcesBody: Vaccine schedules, forms, and developmental guides.
Home.faqSubheading: Everything you need to know about visiting our clinics.
Home.bottomCtaHeading: Your child can be seen today.
Home.bottomCtaBody: Book online in under a minute, or call and we'll find the soonest opening.
Home.resourcesSectionHeading: Everything your family needs, in one place.
Home.browseAllResourcesBody: See every guide, form, and video we have for your family in one place.

Doctors.heading: Our Doctors
Doctors.description: {count} board-certified pediatricians across Greater LA. Search by name, or filter by clinic and specialty.
Doctors.expertiseBody1: With Kids & Teens Pediatric Medical Group, you have access to a team of over 50 dedicated board-certified pediatric doctors.
Doctors.expertiseBody2: Our experts are available seven days a week, standing by to provide the highest level of care to your child. We understand that children's health needs don't follow a schedule, and neither do we.
Doctors.expertiseBody3: Whether it's a routine check-up or an urgent concern, our knowledgeable team is here to guide you through every step of your child's medical journey.
Doctors.expertiseImageAlt: A Kids & Teens pediatrician sharing a high-five with a young patient

Locations.heading: Find a Clinic
Locations.description: A clinic close to home, from the Valley to the South Bay.
Locations.mapUnavailable: Map is temporarily unavailable — see clinic addresses below.
Locations.mapTitle: Map of Kids & Teens clinic locations
Locations.directionsSubheading: Find your nearest clinic and open turn-by-turn directions in Google Maps.

Network.heading: More ways to care for your family.
Network.description: Kids & Teens Medical Group works alongside three sister companies to cover family practice, pediatric therapy, and hospital care in Sri Lanka, all under one trusted network.

Foundation.preventiveScreeningsBody: Early detection of health issues through regular screenings for vision, hearing, dental, and nutrition, reducing long-term healthcare costs.
Foundation.studentWellnessBody: On-campus counseling and mental health support programs that improve academic performance, reduce absenteeism, and build resilience.
Foundation.internationalStandardsBody: Bringing US-trained pediatric expertise and evidence-based protocols to Sri Lanka, elevating the quality of school-based healthcare.
Foundation.communityImpactBody: Wellness centers serve not just students but entire families, creating a ripple effect of health literacy and preventive care across Negombo.

Careers.heroHeading: Build Your Career at Kids & Teens
Careers.heroSubhead: Join LA's largest pediatric network. 18+ years of excellence, 25+ clinics, and a team that puts families first.
Careers.benefitsIntro: We invest in the people who care for our families.
Careers.benefit1Body: Plan for the future with a retirement match and profit sharing.
Careers.benefit2Body: Medical, dental, and vision coverage for you and your dependents.
Careers.benefit3Body: Recharge with generous PTO and paid holidays.
Careers.benefit4Body: Grow with support for licensure, CME, and professional development.
Careers.noOpenings: No openings in this department right now. Check back soon.
Careers.cultureBody: For 18+ years we have grown a team built on compassion, teamwork, innovation, and personalized care. When you join Kids & Teens, you join people who show up for each other and for every family we serve.
Careers.cultureValue2: Administrative support so you can focus on patients
Careers.formIntro: Tell us a bit about you and attach your CV. We'll be in touch if there's a fit.
Careers.messagePlaceholder: Tell us why you'd be a great fit…
Careers.cvHint: PDF, DOC, or DOCX. Max 5 MB.
Careers.successBody: Thanks for applying. We'll review your CV and reach out if there's a fit.
Careers.privacyNote: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about your application. Please don't include sensitive medical details.
Careers.heroImageAlt: Kids & Teens care team members smiling together in a clinic
Careers.benefitsImageAlt: A pediatric clinician talking with a colleague
Careers.cultureImageAlt: Members of the Kids & Teens team collaborating
Careers.postingsNotice: Our official job postings are only shared on our social media pages, our own company websites, and Indeed. Be cautious of postings claiming to represent Kids & Teens Medical Group anywhere else.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.cvType: Please upload a PDF, DOC, or DOCX file.
errors.cvTooLarge: Your file is too large. Please keep it under 5 MB.
errors.sendFailed: We couldn't submit your application right now. Please email your CV to us directly.

Insurance.heading: We accept all major insurance.
Insurance.description: Coverage shouldn't be a barrier to care. We accept the plan categories below across our clinics, plus Serendib Healthways for families in an HMO/IPA.
Insurance.hmoRestrictionsTitle: Stuck with your HMO plan restrictions?
Insurance.hmoRestrictionsBody: Switch to Serendib Healthways HMO/IPA for access to our network with no referrals required.

Resources.heading: Everything in one place.
Resources.description: Vaccine schedules, patient forms, and developmental guides for your family. Downloads are being added here soon. Contact your clinic in the meantime for a copy.

About.heading: Kids & Teens Pediatric Medical Group
About.tagline: Caring for the Future Generations in Greater Los Angeles
About.intro: Kids & Teens Medical Group is a pediatric practice dedicated to providing compassionate, comprehensive care for children and adolescents. Our team of board-certified pediatricians is committed to offering personalized care tailored to your child's unique needs. We offer a wide range of services, including:
About.locationsIntro: With {count} locations throughout Los Angeles and beyond, we're here to serve your family's needs. We accept most major insurance plans, including any HMO/IPA:
About.closing: For those without insurance, we offer affordable payment options. Rest assured, your child's health is our top priority. Schedule an appointment today and let us help your family thrive.

Testimonials.heading: Share Your Experience
Testimonials.intro1: Kids & Teens Medical Group is a general pediatrics practice that takes an integrated approach to care, with offices across Greater LA offering high-quality pediatric care and pediatric urgent care services.
Testimonials.intro2: We always appreciate feedback from our valued patients, and we're thrilled that so many parents have shared their positive experiences with us.
Testimonials.googleReviewsSubheading: Select a clinic to read or leave a review on Google.
Testimonials.closing: Please read what others are saying about Kids & Teens Medical Group above, and as always, we would love to collect your feedback too.

Services.heading: Comprehensive Pediatric Care
Services.intro: Kids & Teens Medical Group provides exceptional healthcare tailored to the needs of children and adolescents, from newborn checkups to teen medicine.

Blog.heading: Parent Stories & Tips
Blog.intro: Seasonal health advice, safety tips, and guidance from our pediatric team to help your family stay informed.

Contact.eyebrow: We reply within one business day
Contact.heading: We're here for your family. How can we help?
Contact.intro: Questions about appointments, insurance, records, or billing? Reach out and a member of our care team will get back to you. For a same-day visit, calling is fastest.
Contact.hoursNote: Hours vary by clinic across our {count} Greater LA locations.
Contact.emergencyBody: Call 911 or go to your nearest emergency room. This form is not monitored for urgent care.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help your family…
Contact.successBody: Your message has been sent. We'll reply within one business day.
Contact.privacyNote: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about your inquiry. Please don't include sensitive medical details.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.sendFailed: We couldn't send your message right now. Please call or email us directly.

home.title: Pediatric Care Across Greater Los Angeles
home.description: Board-certified pediatricians at clinics across Greater Los Angeles. Well-child visits, urgent care, vaccines, and telehealth 7 days a week.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Compassionate, comprehensive pediatric care across Greater Los Angeles, from routine check-ups to urgent care and after-hours visits.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Pediatric health tips, parenting guidance, and clinic news from the pediatricians at Kids & Teens Medical Group.

careers.title: Careers
careers.description: Join Kids & Teens Medical Group. Explore pediatric and clinical career opportunities across our Greater Los Angeles clinics.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with Kids & Teens Medical Group. Call, text, or send us a message about appointments, insurance, records, or billing across our Greater LA clinics.

doctors.title: Our Doctors
doctors.description: Meet the board-certified pediatricians at Kids & Teens Medical Group, caring for children and teens across Greater Los Angeles.

foundation.title: Kids and Teens Foundation
foundation.description: The Kids and Teens Foundation expands access to pediatric care and community health programs for families in Greater Los Angeles.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: We accept most major plans including Medi-Cal, LA Care, Molina, Blue Shield, and Anthem. Coverage is never a barrier to care.

locations.title: Find a Clinic
locations.description: Find a Kids & Teens Medical Group pediatric clinic near you across Greater Los Angeles, with same-day and walk-in visits.

network.title: Our Network
network.description: Kids & Teens Medical Group partners with leading hospitals and health systems across Greater Los Angeles for coordinated pediatric care.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.description: How Kids & Teens Medical Group collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

resources.title: Parent Resources
resources.description: Helpful pediatric resources for parents: vaccine schedules, growth guidance, health forms, and after-hours care information.

services.title: Services
services.description: Comprehensive pediatric services: well-child exams, vaccines, sick and urgent care, adolescent medicine, and asthma and allergy care.
